---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new agent or enhancement to an existing workflow."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "proposal"]
assignees: []

---

### 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the new agent or feature.

### 💼 Business Value / Use Case
Describe why this agent is needed and what problem it solves in an automated workflow.

### 🧩 Proposed Flow
If you've drafted the logic:
- **Trigger**: How is this agent invoked?
- **AI Logic**: Which LLM nodes or LangChain agents are central?
- **Output**: Where is the data distributed? (e.g., WhatsApp, CRM, Slack)

### 🛰 Integration Requirements
Does this require a new n8n node or external API connectivity?

### 📉 Alternative Solutions
Have you considered other ways to solve this problem?

### 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, such as specialized prompt strategies or model requirements.
